admin.tabs_help: Build your mobile bottom bar. Each row is a tab — pick a type, set a Font Awesome icon and label, choose who sees it, and tick "Raised" to make it the lifted center button. Reorder with the arrows. The Site logo and Favicon types show your site image automatically. Leave the list empty to use the default bar.
admin.preview_caption: Live preview (phone) — drag order with the arrows
